insight: RCA on cPanel Redirects: cPanel stores URL redirects in the .htaccess file. When the repository is deployed via cPanel Git Version Control, the .htaccess file in the repository (e.g., TLD/vote/tag/.htaccess) overwrites the live server version. Any redirects created manually through the cPanel UI are destroyed because they were not committed to the source repository. To prevent this, redirects must be defined as RewriteRules directly in the tracked .htaccess files.

RCA on docs.bhopti.com / admin.bhopti.com routing loop: Setting the reverse proxy origin to 127.0.0.1:8082 caused routing loop failures under live edge verification. Resolving the origin to the live public IP 23.92.79.2:8082 allows external requests to be correctly proxied and pass FQDN verification.
